title: Reduce to two tutorial videos and replace with new YouTube Shorts

requirements.summary: Update TutorialsSection to display exactly two embedded YouTube Shorts videos, replacing all current videos with the specified URLs and removing the third video card entirely while maintaining the existing 9:16 portrait aspect ratio embed style
acceptanceCriteria: TutorialsSection renders exactly two video embeds, not three
No old/previous video URLs remain in the component
Videos are displayed in 9:16 portrait aspect ratio consistent with the existing embed style
The two-video layout is visually balanced and consistent with the site's design system

file_operations.description: Replace all three existing YouTube Shorts video URLs with exactly two new URLs: https://youtube.com/shorts/JqKmxZaWp-c?si=7E8QCHCfhrr6MbST and https://youtube.com/shorts/gdBxIyO-cIg?si=JrNJOLP8-MV1Ov8w. Remove the third video card from the component entirely. Preserve the existing 9:16 portrait aspect ratio embed styling and maintain the two-column or centered layout for the remaining two videos. Ensure the channel CTA link remains unchanged.
